ksa_text: Design and implement organizational governance structures, policies, and internal controls for data quality and management.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop and direct system testing and validation procedures and documentation.

nice.top_element_label: Create system testing and validation procedures and documentation

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Develop and direct system testing and validation procedures and documentation.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-T-013 (Data Quality/Task) scores 0.433 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.433). Scope is edge_case for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, Data Quality, composite 0.433. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Quality for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in ~45% of SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer postings as secondary competency. Data quality and integrity for regulatory submissions and clinical evidence. Zero role-specific signals insufficient for edge-case inclusion at 45% market penetration.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Data Quality without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. Data Quality without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.
